title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Gradeup Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Gradeup Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gradeup Ventures Solutions family as a Instructional Designer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gradeup Ventures Solutions:
Gradeup Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup Ventures Solutions!
